# synchronizationClock

**Instance Property**

A clock to use for output synchronization.

## Declaration

```swift
var synchronizationClock: CMClock? { get }
```

## Discussion

The synchronization clock provides the timebase for sample buffers that the stream outputs. Use it to synchronize with the clocks of other media sources, such as the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AVFoundation/AVCaptureSession/synchronizationClock] of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AVFoundation/AVCaptureSession].
title: synchronizationClock
